title: My Name Is Khan
posterAlt: My Name Is Khan (2010) movie poster
tmdbOverview: Rizwan Khan, a Muslim from the Borivali section of Mumbai, has Asperger's syndrome. He marries a Hindu single mother, Mandira, in San Francisco. After 9/11, Rizwan is detained by authorities at LAX who treat him as a terrorist because of his condition and his race.
synopsis: Released in 2010, My Name Is Khan is a drama and romance film from India and United States. It holds a solid 7.9 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a PG-13 certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
